name: Stale config with phantom refresh and duplicated constants

planted_issues.description: CONFIG is loaded once at import time via `CONFIG = load_config()` (line 52) and never refreshed. Any config changes on disk require a full process restart to take effect, despite the module being part of a long-running service.
Module docstring (line 4) claims 'Configuration is refreshed every 5 minutes' but no refresh mechanism, timer, or background thread exists anywhere in the code. The docstring is actively misleading.

MAX_RETRIES is defined as 3 in this file (line 16) but the same constant is defined as 5 in the project's shared constants.py. Having two sources of truth for the same value means they will inevitably diverge.

clean_areas.description: The NotificationConfig dataclass is well-structured with proper type hints, sensible defaults, and field factories for mutable defaults.
